recommendations.title: Rab Ne Bana Di Jodi
recommendations.overview: A lonely 40-ish man, likely to remain a bachelor, has a chance to find the love of his life when he falls for a vivacious young woman.

recommendations.title: The Dreamseller
recommendations.overview: A disillusioned psychologist tries to commit suicide until he strikes up a friendship with an unlikely saviour who teaches him a new way of living.

recommendations.title: The Full House
recommendations.overview: Antoine, a bachelor party-goer, gets new roommates: Jeanne and her two children.

recommendations.title: Happy Death Day
recommendations.overview: Caught in a bizarre and terrifying time warp, college student Tree finds herself repeatedly reliving the day of her murder, ultimately realizing that she must identify the killer and the reason for her death before her chances of survival run out.

recommendations.title: Triple Dog
recommendations.overview: On the night of a sleepover, a group of teenage girls venture out in a competitive game of challenging dares. As the antics escalate, and the dares become more extreme, the girls unravel the truth behind a former student's rumored suicide.

recommendations.title: Loser
recommendations.overview: On a university scholarship, a good natured student from the midwest gets a crash course in city life while dealing with three evil roommates. He befriends a virtually homeless college student whom he falls for, but she's dating a nasty professor.

recommendations.title: National Lampoon Presents Dorm Daze
recommendations.overview: When a foreign-exchange student and a hooker - both named Dominique - show up on a college campus, the unsuspecting student body is in for the education of a lifetime!

recommendations.title: 4 Months, 3 Weeks and 2 Days
recommendations.overview: Two college roommates have 24 hours to make the ultimate choice as they finalize arrangements for a black market abortion.

recommendations.title: Cashback
recommendations.overview: Ben is an art college student in London, whose imagination runs wild as he works the late-night shift at the local supermarket. What do he and his colleagues do to pass the long, endless hours of the night?

recommendations.title: Ricky & Barabba
recommendations.overview: A wealthy millionaire decided to commit suicide but meets a homeless with whom he experiences a lot of funny adventures until finally makes order in his life.
